docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT **JUDGMENT VACATED PER COURT ORDER FILED ON 1-21-21 **
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $120.00) SERVED FEB-22-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEM, BETTY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-10-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF KELSEY TODD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BETTY LEM IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEM, BETTY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TODD, KELSEY AS TO DEFENDANT LEM, BETTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TODD, KELSEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEM, BETTY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,170.00, THE LEASE AND STATUTES REQUIRE DEFENDANT TO TIMELY AND PROPERLY RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. DOCUMENTS AND PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY SUPPORT THAT DEFENDANT VIOLATED CCP1950.6(G) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEM, BETTY HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2020 - CONTINUED TO MAY-27-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (JR/506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-28-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2020 - JUDGMENT. **JUDGMENT VACATED PER COURT ORDER FILED ON 1-21-21 **

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY BETTY LEM IS GRANTED. HEARING IS HELD. PLAINTIFF KELSEY TODD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BETTY LEM IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. SETTLEMENT IS REACHED BY PARTIES FOR $969.50 (SETTLEMENT AMOUNT $799.50, COURT COST $170.00 = $969.50) TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 11, 2021 THROUGH VENMO. PROGRESS REPORT DATE HAS BEEN SET FOR FEBRUARY 26, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M. NO APPEARANCE IS REGUIRED IF PAID IN FULL BY THE DUE DATE AND THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE APPPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506) CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-16-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT
